languages.text: {n}Маражай с торжествующим видом протягивает руку, хватая сервочереп.{/n} "Скулить бесполезно, хоть твои мольбы и услаждают мой слух, мон-кай. Эта безделушка отныне принадлежит мне. Твоя никчемная жизнь — тоже".

{n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."
languages.original_text: {n}Маражай с торжествующим видом протягивает руку, хватая сервочереп.{/n} "Скулить бесполезно, хоть твои мольбы и услаждают мой слух, мон-кай. Эта безделушка отныне принадлежит мне. Твоя никчемная жизнь — тоже".

traits.locale_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai i thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

{n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai i thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

{n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

{n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

languages.text: {n}Con una mirada triunfal, Marazhai extiende rápidamente la mano para apoderarse del servocráneo.{/n} «Los lloriqueos son inútiles, aunque tus súplicas son música para mis oídos, mon-keigh. Esta fruslería me pertenece ahora. Al igual que tu patética vida».
languages.original_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con una mirada triunfal, Marazhai extiende rápidamente la mano para apoderarse del servocráneo.{/n} «Los lloriqueos son inútiles, aunque tus súplicas son música para mis oídos, mon-keigh. Esta fruslería me pertenece ahora. Al igual que tu patética vida».

languages.text: {n}玛拉斋露出胜利者般的笑容，猛地伸手抓住那伺服头骨。{/n}“哀嚎毫无意义，不过你的恳求在我听来却如同美妙的乐章，猴子。这小玩意儿现在归我了，你那可悲的小命也一样。”
languages.original_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

traits.locale_text: {n}玛拉斋露出胜利者般的笑容，猛地伸手抓住那伺服头骨。{/n}“哀嚎毫无意义，不过你的恳求在我听来却如同美妙的乐章，猴子。这小玩意儿现在归我了，你那可悲的小命也一样。”

languages.text: {n}Mit einem triumphierenden Blick wirft Marazhai seine Hände nach vorne und packt den Servoschädel.{/n} "Jammern ist zwecklos, wobei Euer Flehen Musik in meinen Ohren ist, Chem-Pan-Sey. Dieses Spielzeug gehört jetzt mir. Genau wie Euer armseliges Leben."
languages.original_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem triumphierenden Blick wirft Marazhai seine Hände nach vorne und packt den Servoschädel.{/n} "Jammern ist zwecklos, wobei Euer Flehen Musik in meinen Ohren ist, Chem-Pan-Sey. Dieses Spielzeug gehört jetzt mir. Genau wie Euer armseliges Leben."

languages.text: {n}Avec un regard triomphant, Marazhai se saisit du servocrâne d'un geste vif comme l'éclair.{/n} « Inutile de geindre, même si vos jérémiades sont une douce mélodie à mes oreilles, mon-keigh. Désormais, votre précieux gadget m'appartient, tout comme votre misérable vie. »
languages.original_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec un regard triomphant, Marazhai se saisit du servocrâne d'un geste vif comme l'éclair.{/n} « Inutile de geindre, même si vos jérémiades sont une douce mélodie à mes oreilles, mon-keigh. Désormais, votre précieux gadget m'appartient, tout comme votre misérable vie. »

languages.text: {n}Zafer dolu bir bakışla Marazhai, elini öne doğru atarak hizmeleti yakalıyor.{/n} "Sızlanmak nafile, gerçi yalvarışların kulaklarıma müzik gibi geliyor mon-keigh. Bu zamazingo artık bana ait. Tıpkı acınası hayatın gibi."
languages.original_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."

traits.locale_text: {n}Zafer dolu bir bakışla Marazhai, elini öne doğru atarak hizmeleti yakalıyor.{/n} "Sızlanmak nafile, gerçi yalvarışların kulaklarıma müzik gibi geliyor mon-keigh. Bu zamazingo artık bana ait. Tıpkı acınası hayatın gibi."

languages.text: {n}マラーザイは勝利の表情で手を伸ばし、サーボスカルを掴んだ。{/n}「泣きじゃくるのは無駄だ。お前たちの訴えは耳に心地よいが、この戦利品は俺のものだ。お前たちの哀れな命も俺のものだ。」
languages.original_text: {n}With a look of triumph, Marazhai thrusts his hand forward, seizing the servo-skull.{/n} "Whining is futile, though your pleas are music to my ears, mon-keigh. This bauble belongs to me now. As does your pathetic life."
